component.name: SeasonChip
component.script: sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.label = m.top.findNode("label") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.label.text = c.title end sub sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.bg.color = "0xff2424ff" m.label.color = "0xffffffff" else m.bg.color = "0x232323ff" m.label.color = "0xc8c8c8ff" end if end sub
